----- Original Message ----
From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: cykyc@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, June 11, 2007 2:40:13 PM
Subject: Re: ports/113595: Change to MASTER_SITES in security/unicornscan


Maintainer of security/unicornscan,

Please note that PR ports/113595 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/113595

-- 
Edwin Groothuis
edwin@FreeBSD.org
